//: AgentArena match config. Copy this to agentarena.config.json and edit it. Any line whose key starts with // is a comment and is ignored. Fields marked OPTIONAL can be deleted.
//players: REQUIRED: 2 to 16 players. Each needs id, name and provider.

players.name: White (Claude)

provider.//type: REQUIRED: one of anthropic | openai | google | ollama.
provider.//apiKey: OPTIONAL: overrides the env var (here ANTHROPIC_API_KEY). Prefer .env.

players.//systemPrompt: OPTIONAL: overrides the game's built-in prompt for this player.
players.systemPrompt: You are playing chess as White. Each turn, call get_board, then call make_move with a legal UCI move. Illegal moves cost a fault; 3 faults and you lose.
players.//price: OPTIONAL: USD per 1M tokens. Only used to show live cost; remove to hide cost.

players.name: Black (GPT)
players.systemPrompt: You are playing chess as Black. Each turn, call get_board, then call make_move with a legal UCI move. Illegal moves cost a fault; 3 faults and you lose.

//mcpServer: REQUIRED: the MCP game server. Use transport stdio to launch a local server, or sse to connect to a URL.

mcpServer.//env: OPTIONAL: environment variables passed to the game server process.

//stateToolName: OPTIONAL: name of the tool the engine calls to read game state (default: get_state).
//limits: OPTIONAL: every field has a default, so the whole block can be removed.
